extra.reason: Fixed in feat/v1-visual-spike: main.go now builds an http.Server with ReadHeaderTimeout/ReadTimeout/WriteTimeout/IdleTimeout instead of http.ListenAndServe. Resolves gosec G114.

dk approved forest landing (model A): treemap navigator sized by live open beads, region-color headings, corner count + P0/P1 red-square flag, hover hint bar, drill region→epic→bead→drawer, inert group-by slot
Classify bd errors by kind: ErrNotFound->404, ErrInvalidArg->400, ErrBD->502, unclassified->500. Added classify() in internal/bd + statusForError() in server. Tests both layers.
superseded by strand-2bd / PR #5: statusForError maps ErrNotFound->404, ErrInvalidArg->400, ErrBD->502, unclassified->500. Acceptance criteria met.
Shipped as forest landing via PR #6 (merged). Forest reframe supersedes the literal V1-table DONE; settled with dk.
V1 writes shipped via PR #7 (edit/claim/close/reopen, honest re-read errors). make check green.

Repo selector + registry shipped: internal/registry (XDG persist, ~/Projects scan, MRU default, add/switch), server resolves bd source per active repo, header dropdown re-scopes via HX-Refresh, actionable empty state. Tests + race green.
V1 CRUD shipped (comments/create/delete); make check green; PR #8
V2 kanban shipped — drag-to-mutate, pivotable status/priority/assignee, revert-on-error; merged in PR #8 / commit fa4e0bc
Epic 1 complete — V1 table + V2 kanban shipped, all 7 children closed (.1–.7)
Added make audit (check+dupe+vuln+nilcheck) + make deploy/install/uninstall via launchd; .jscpd.json; Version stamp. All gates green.

in-process bead-graph metrics lib shipped: internal/graph (gonum — PageRank/betweenness/HITS/Tarjan cycles/longest-path critical path, pure + fixture-tested) + bd.Deps edge-fetch + IssueSource.Deps seam. make check green; live pipeline verified against strand's own beads.
